_policy: Doors = opportunity types. Required signals are Meridian-native (scores, track, ATS). One resume, one audit, many doors.

doors.label: ATS-ready applications
doors.description: Your resume is optimized for applicant tracking systems so you can apply with confidence.

doors.label: Partner tech internships
doors.description: Qualify for tech internships from companies we've vetted (e.g. Stripe, Figma).

doors.label: Pre-Health ready
doors.description: Signal readiness for shadowing, clinical roles, and pre-health applications.

doors.label: Business & consulting ready
doors.description: Strong signal for business, consulting, and analyst roles.
